summary: Recording details are unclear and reviewers describe the concert as lackluster with no standout moments.
review: Both reviewers give little concrete information about the audio source; one rates it zero stars while the other offers a neutral three‑star rating. The second reviewer notes that the Dead were “lackluster at the Ice Palace,” but provides no specifics on songs, performance nuances, or recording quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two vague reviews; one negative rating and one neutral, with no details on sound quality or musical highlights, leading to a low overall assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about the audio source, clarity, mix, or any technical issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers mention a generally lackluster performance and provide no details on set structure or notable transitions.
